creator: gavin@FreeBSD.org
text:
On Tue, 2007-05-15 at 21:58 -0400, Jan Knepper wrote:
> Yes, PR amd64/107345 basically is a duplicate.
> I thought the dmesg was attached for  107345 if now, let me know so I 
> can try to redo this when I have time.

No, no dmesg was attached.  Please do obtain a verbose dmesg of the
system in question and the output of "pciconf -l", and attach them to
this PR. I've closed the other as a duplicate.

Thank,

Gavin
